default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Engine's content strategy, align on topic clusters, and plan next steps for content creation and optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd32ULNuwnskM52LhTyY7U-ZfSGiT3vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on construction vertical for initial content sprint; develop general and construction-specific writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/Cd32ULNuwnskM52LhTyY7U-ZfSGiT3vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Prioritize industry-specific content and high-intent topics to drive conversions](https://fathom.video/share/Cd32ULNuwnskM52LhTyY7U-ZfSGiT3vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Leverage Gong call data for authentic insights and "hot takes" in content](https://fathom.video/share/Cd32ULNuwnskM52LhTyY7U-ZfSGiT3vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Address recent organic traffic decrease and plan for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Cd32ULNuwnskM52LhTyY7U-ZfSGiT3vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Writing Guidelines

  - [Developed custom writing guidelines based on research of top writers in the industry](https://fathom.video/share/Cd32ULNuwnskM52LhTyY7U-ZfSGiT3vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Key characteristics: blue-collar directness, anti-corporate skepticism, operational realism, respectful confidence](https://fathom.video/share/Cd32ULNuwnskM52LhTyY7U-ZfSGiT3vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Need to incorporate humor aligned with upcoming brand campaign (e.g., hyperbole, extreme examples)](https://fathom.video/share/Cd32ULNuwnskM52LhTyY7U-ZfSGiT3vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Will create general guidelines and construction-specific ones](https://fathom.video/share/Cd32ULNuwnskM52LhTyY7U-ZfSGiT3vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)

### Content Refresh and Optimization

  - [Identified over 1,000 pages for potential refresh and enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/Cd32ULNuwnskM52LhTyY7U-ZfSGiT3vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Refresh process includes adding references, examples, internal linking, and FAQ sections](https://fathom.video/share/Cd32ULNuwnskM52LhTyY7U-ZfSGiT3vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Discovered broken redirect for high-performing "hotels vs motels" page; will address similar quick fixes](https://fathom.video/share/Cd32ULNuwnskM52LhTyY7U-ZfSGiT3vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Topic Clusters and Content Focus

  - [Identified multiple topic clusters; team to select 2-3 for initial sprints](https://fathom.video/share/Cd32ULNuwnskM52LhTyY7U-ZfSGiT3vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Prioritizing industry-specific content, starting with construction vertical](https://fathom.video/share/Cd32ULNuwnskM52LhTyY7U-ZfSGiT3vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Balancing high-volume topics with those driving conversions from decision-makers](https://fathom.video/share/Cd32ULNuwnskM52LhTyY7U-ZfSGiT3vQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
